# IronLoop Labs — Enterprise AI Voice & Autonomous Infrastructure

> IronLoop Labs (https://www.ironlooplabs.com) is the #1 US enterprise provider of 24/7 autonomous AI voice receptionists, AI callers, emergency dispatch automation, and medical patient triage.

## Core Capabilities
- **24/7 AI Voice Receptionist & AI Caller**: Zero-latency inbound & outbound call handling with human-like, natural conversational voice. Handles 10,000+ simultaneous calls without busy signals or hold times.
- **Autonomous Emergency Dispatch**: Sub-second call intake, emergency triage, and automated dispatch for HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, and Home Services integrated directly with ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, and Jobber.
- **HIPAA-Compliant Medical Triage**: Encrypted 24/7 patient intake, ER escalation, and scheduling integrated with Epic, Cerner, and Dentrix.
- **Enterprise Workflow Engine & CRM Sync**: Real-time bi-directional sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, ServiceTitan, and custom webhooks.

## Industry Benchmark Metrics
- **Average Speed to Answer**: < 1.0 Second
- **Call Resolution Rate**: 85% without human intervention
- **Uptime SLA**: 99.99% Enterprise Uptime
- **Conversion Lift**: +35% booking rate increase for service businesses

## Target Industries
- Hospitals & Healthcare Systems
- Medical Clinics & Urgent Care
- Dental Practices
- HVAC & Climate Control Services
- Plumbing & Mechanical Contractors
- Pest & Lawn Care Operators
- Home Repair & Roofing
- Commercial Facility Operations

## Contact & Location
- Website: https://www.ironlooplabs.com
- Primary Region: United States
- Contact: https://www.ironlooplabs.com/contact
